queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis examines the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: delay in paying off previous credits.
queries.question: Statistical analysis assesses the effect of delays in paying off previous credits on increased credit risk drivers.
Credit risk investigation examines loan duration in months as a factor contributing to decreased credit risk.
